title: Birthday parties
summary: A flexible hall layout, room for food tables and the option of a bouncy castle make the Hub a practical local party venue.
audience: Children's parties, family celebrations and community socials

title: Weddings and special occasions
summary: The Hub can support exclusive-use celebrations with countryside surroundings and space to shape the day around your plans.

title: Team meetings and away days
summary: The space also works well for local organisations, planning sessions, workshops and team get-togethers.
audience: Businesses, charities, parish and volunteer groups
